text_block_list.text:
One day, after Special Week has a number of
victories under her belt...
Ding dong!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Traineeeeer! Are you there?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm coming in!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... Well, about that.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Remember that thing I got you to hold onto?
Something I received from Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We've got so much we need to work on right now,
so this isn't the time to sit back and relax at a hot
spring.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Please give it back to me when we've managed to
get everything done!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, remember now?
choice_data_list:
The ticket for a hot spring trip we won in that
raffle?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Bingo! So about that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, I've had someone in mind for the
person I wanna go with.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And now I can finally say this since I've achieved
results that I'm proud of!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Come with me to the hot springs!
While soaking in the hot springs...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... That felt amazing!
choice_data_list: All of my knots are gone...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, you're like a rickety old person!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, you're like a rickety old person!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooooh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Since we've still got some time before dinner, can
I hang out in your room?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, it kinda feels strange.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This isn't a training camp, and we're not doing
this for a race...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yet here we are, having a little sleepover.
choice_data_list: Yeah, it's not something we do every day.
Yeah, it's not something we do every day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oooh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We always have to talk about me during camp
and before and after races, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Like our training plan, my physical and mental
health, stuff like that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But we're not gonna do that today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Since I've got you here, I wanna hear all about
you tonight!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup! You've listened to me talk so much about
my family, friends, troubles, and dreams.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wanna learn everything about you too!

Special Week and I chat away until her stomach
grumbles.

I sense that Special Week and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
